mods.refresh: Rescan Steam Workshop folders for mods containing localization files
mods.hiddenToggle: Switch between viewing normal and hidden mods
mods.importLocalPack: Import a local .pack file that is not from Steam Workshop
mods.filterNotImported: Show only mods without translation projects
mods.filterNeedsUpdate: Show only mods with pending updates or changes

projects.filterNeedsUpdate: Show projects requiring attention due to mod source changes
projects.filterNeedsReview: Show projects with at least one unit flagged for review
projects.filterIncomplete: Show projects not yet 100% translated in all configured languages
projects.filterHasComplete: Show projects with at least one language fully translated
projects.filterExportOutdated: Show projects modified since their last export
projects.filterExported: Show only projects that have been exported
projects.filterNotExported: Show only projects that have never been exported

editor.modelSelector: Select the AI model to use for translation
editor.useTm: When checked, consult Translation Memory before querying the AI model. Uncheck to bypass TM and always send units directly to the model.
editor.batchAuto: Calculate the batch size automatically from the selected model's token budget. Turn off to pin a fixed Units / batch value.
editor.batchUnits: Maximum translation units per LLM request (1–1000). Lower values reduce timeouts at the cost of more tokens consumed.
editor.batchParallel: Number of simultaneous LLM requests (1–20). Higher is faster but increases API load; 3–5 is typical.

settings.detectAllGames: Scan Steam installation to automatically find game paths
settings.testRpfm: Validate RPFM executable and display version
settings.addIgnoredText: Add a new source text to skip during translation
settings.resetIgnoredDefaults: Delete all entries and restore default ignored texts
settings.setDefaultModel: Set as default model for this provider

tm.import: Import translation memory entries from a TMX file
tm.export: Export translation memory entries to a TMX file
tm.cleanup: Remove unused entries to reduce database size
